title: Malted Crispy Dutch Brie Bake
description: A bold, wood‑fired bake that fuses malty oat flour with creamy vegan brie on crunchy bread, delivering a golden, crispy finish with a hint of smoked paprika.
instructions: In a bowl mix the malted oat flour, salt, smoked paprika, minced garlic, chopped thyme, and nutritional yeast.
Brush each slice of whole wheat bread with melted coconut oil and spread the oat mixture on top of each slice.
Place a generous slice of vegan brie on each prepared bread slice.
Drizzle maple syrup over the brie for extra caramelization.
Arrange the slices on a baking tray and bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes or until the edges are golden and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes before cutting into squares.
Serve immediately as a warm, crispy snack or starter.
Enjoy the malty crunch and creamy, smoky flavors.
